COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-21-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly from Dept. 206 for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: R. Edwards/D. Carter, CSR: Joann Prior, CSR # 9129.
Jack Marquez, Esq., for Plaintiff: Christopher Lindsey (asst. property Manager); Witness present, sworn and examined
No appearance by defendant

Exhibit # 1 Rental Agreement.................ID/EV
Exhibit # 2 3 Day Ntc. to Pay/Quit...........ID/EV

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Kenneth Michael Gilbert as follows:
Principal $974.50
Damages $4,111.56
Costs $153.30 for a total of $5,239.36
Rental Agreement forfeited; restitution and possession of property at 3476 18th Street #34

Judgment signed in open court. Exhibits were withdrawn and returned to counsel.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
